diagrams.title: REPL Cycle Flow
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing the four stages of shell interpretive cycle
elements: Execute command (expand variables, redirect I/O, fork/exec)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize continuous nature of shell interaction and remember REPL order

diagrams.title: Command Processing Pipeline
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing command from input to execution
diagrams.purpose: Understand detailed command processing stages in shell

diagrams.title: Shell Initialization Files
diagrams.description: Hierarchy diagram showing which files are read when
diagrams.purpose: Remember initialization file order for different shell types

diagrams.title: Process Creation with fork-exec
diagrams.description: Diagram showing parent-child process relationship during command execution
elements: Child completes or runs in background
diagrams.purpose: Understand how shell creates and manages child processes

visuals.title: The Shells Interpretive Cycle
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the shells interpretive cycle
